items.title: NBC News poll of 1,000 registered voters: just 26% had a positive view of AI, while 46% had a negative view, the third worst net negative score of all topics (Jake Angelo/Fortune)
items.title_en: NBC News poll of 1,000 registered voters: just 26% had a positive view of AI, while 46% had a negative view, the third worst net negative score of all topics (Jake Angelo/Fortune)
items.title_zh: NBC 新闻对 1,000 名注册选民进行的民意调查：只有 26% 的人对人工智能持积极看法，而 46% 的人持消极看法，这是所有主题中第三差的净负面得分（Jake Angelo/财富）
